label: BOSS CMASS subsample A — log M_*/h^-2 Msun in [11.10, 12.00]
title: The Weak Lensing Signal and the Clustering of BOSS Galaxies II: Astrophysical and Cosmological Constraints
authors: More, Miyatake, Mandelbaum, Takada, Spergel, Brownstein, Schneider
ng_source: More+2015 Section 2 (includes fiber-collided and redshift-failure galaxies)
lensing_source: CFHTLS (~105 deg^2 overlap with BOSS DR11, CFHTLenS catalog)

distance_cosmology.note: Flat LCDM with Omega_m=0.27 assumed for converting redshifts to comoving distances (paper Section 2)

cosmology_priors.note: WMAP9+SPT+ACT priors on 100*Omega_b*h^2, n_s, h; Omega_m and sigma8 left free

sigma2.note: sigma^2 = variance of log M; sigma_logM = sqrt(0.22) = 0.469

kappa.note: satellite cutoff M_0 = kappa * M_min; log10m0 = log10(kappa) + logMmin

Mstar11.note: stellar mass parameter in 10^11 h^-2 Msun, upper limit

code_param_mapping.note: Mapping to Kravtsov04 satellite HOD as implemented in hod_mod (Lange25HODModel / ZhengHODModel). HOD eq. (4): N_sat = N_cen * ((M - kappa*Mmin)/M1)^alpha, so M0 = kappa*Mmin.

hod_model_description: 17-parameter HOD (12 HOD + 5 cosmo): Mmin, sigma^2, M1, alpha, kappa, Mstar11, Rc, psi, p_off, R_off, alpha_inc, Minc, plus Omega_m, sigma8, 100*Omega_b*h^2, n_s, h

columns_wp.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns_wp.rpwp_upper_h2Mpc2: upper bound of r_p x w_p; 1-sigma err = upper - central

columns_esd.rp_hMpc: projected radius R in h^-1 Mpc
columns_esd.DS_hMsunpc2: DeltaSigma in (h M_sun/pc^2) — the y-axis value in Figure 3 (right panels)
columns_esd.note: Asymmetric error bars; err_hi = DS_upper - DS, err_lo = DS - DS_lower. For fitting (code units): DeltaSigma [M_sun h/pc^2] = DS_hMsunpc2

extraction_note: wp and ESD manually digitized from More+2015 Fig 3. wp: bwpd format (rp, rp*wp, upper bound), uncertainty = upper - central. ESD: bwpd_4col format (R, DS, upper, lower), asymmetric errors. ESD unit for fitting: DS_code = DS_hMsunpc2
